name: Marguerites
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Prepare 36 mini-muffin pans with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, egg white, and vanilla.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, oats, and nuts.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared mini-muffin tins.
6. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes.
7. While hot, tap the muffin tin to get the muffins out of the pan.
